title: zergpack
description: An all-in-one pack for Hypixel Skyblock, designed to enhance every skill, collection and grind
body:
# zergpack
An all-in-one Hypixel Skyblock pack designed for Forge 1.8.9. This pack prioritizes FPS while offering a vast array of features to enhance every aspect of your gameplay, with a particular focus on dungeons, farming and bazzar/ah.

**Requires Manual [Optfine](http://optifine.net/adloadx?f=preview_OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M6_pre2.jar) Installation**

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

## Mod List
All mods not from modrinth are from the linked github
### Dungeons
- [Skytils](https://github.com/Skytils/SkytilsMod)
- [DungeonRoomsMod](https://github.com/Quantizr/DungeonRoomsMod)
- [Danker's Skyblock Mod](https://github.com/bowser0000/SkyblockMod)

### Optimization
- [Patcher](https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [NotSoEssential](https://modrinth.com/mod/notsoessential)
- [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer)
- [CrashPatch](https://modrinth.com/mod/crashpatch)

### QOL
- [SBCustomMobTex](https://github.com/Moulberry/SBCustomMobTex/)
- [Scrollable Tooltips](https://www.sk1er.club/mods/text_overflow_scroll)
- [EvergreenHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/evergreenhud)
- [VanillaHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillahud)

### Other (Way more features than listed)
- [NotEnoughUpdates](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates)
  - Fairy Soul Waypoints
  - QOL Overlays
  - Custom /ah, /bz and JEI style search
- [Cowlection](https://github.com/cow-mc/Cowlection)
  - Analyze Chests
  - Analyze Island
  - Dungeon Tooltips
- [Skyblock Addons] | [Official EOL](https://github.com/BiscuitDevelopment/SkyblockAddons) | [Unofficial](https://github.com/Fix3dll/SkyblockAddons/tree/main)
  - Better TP Menu
  - Health and Mana UI
- [SkyHanni](https://github.com/hannibal002/SkyHanni)
  - Tons of fishing / farming stuff

</details>

## Features
- Better AH, Better Bazzar, Optimized bazzar flipping
- Accurate Dungeons Score Estimate, Dungeons Secret Waypoints, Dungeons solvers and Dungeons Maps
- Farming Overlay and Garden optimizations
- Mining Overlay, Crystal Hollows Map / Waypoints
- Slayer Overlay, Slayer Drop Tracking
- Other Solvers, Item Search
- Duped item checking and Scammer trade checking
- And much more

<details>
<summary>Backpack Image</summary>

![Backpack Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5iZlHdYg/images/49f28c20acf02a29a21b63655cc8096ed1384d51.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Farming Overlay</summary>

![Farming Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5iZlHdYg/images/c4a5fa26c5ae5d5130daf12ac1b76ca25fef7e41.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Dungeons Overlay</summary>

![Dungeons Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5iZlHdYg/images/d712c7f0e8b5896ed568f3e07d2e51f5cfb572f9.png)

</details>


## Installation
- Install from the Modrinth App or MultiMC
- Requires [Java 8](https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?version=8&arch=x64&package=jdk&os=windows)
- Install [Optfine](http://optifine.net/adloadx?f=preview_OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M6_pre2.jar) and drop the jar in the mods folder
- If you want essentials cosmetics remove the NotSoEssential.jar

### Resolution Settings
Made on 1440p and 4k, 1080p may look worse
- 1080p - GUI Scale: Normal
- 1440p - GUI Scale: Large
- 2160p/4k - GUI Scale: 4x

### Ram settings
- Set max to 4gb

### Performance
- Gets roughly ~50 fps at 4k in hub 1 on a 3080. I have also tested a 2070 at 1440p and a 1080ti at 1080p

### Texture Pack
- Built with [FurfSky](https://furfsky.net/) in mind but can be used with other texture packs.
